title: Linked Item Limits

posts.author: OlivePiper (Jessica Yi)
posts.cookedHtml: I would greatly appreciate it if we could have the option to link an unlimited number of items across all boards. I’ve been using Monday boards for work for approximately 2 years now and recently came across the limitation on the number of items we can link to each board. While I haven’t reached the 10,000 item limit yet, the thought of having to create new boards once I do reach it makes me feel uneasy. I understand that archiving boards might be a potential solution, but it doesn’t quite align with my workflow since I primarily utilize Monday boards for record-keeping and data reviews. It is crucial for me to have all the data readily accessible and years of records consolidated in one board instead of having to transfer them to different boards. I remain optimistic that a resolution can be found to address this matter.
